chosen_action.title: Draft StackOverflow answer for production-reliability workflow question
chosen_action.question_title: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?

why_this_action.summary: Demand-capture lane is the strongest executable move while Apollo and curator outreach remain inside active measurement windows and Reddit is fail-closed.

expected_outcome: Capture high-intent search demand with a polished answer asset that can be posted when posting access is available, pointing qualified evaluators to Codeberg-first repo surfaces.

measurement_window.success_metric: Answer posted or reused in a live StackOverflow-compatible demand-capture surface, then any attributable qualified repo traffic or Codeberg adoption delta.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If this lane keeps producing drafts but no live posting path or reuse path by May 30, 2026, replace it with another executable high-intent demand-capture surface.
